title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: SEC charges Donald Basile in $16M crypto fraud tied to ‘insured’ token
summary: The SEC has sued crypto executive Donald Basile over an alleged $16 million scheme involving false claims about an “insured” Bitcoin Latinum token.

title: You Can Now Use XRP on Solana—Here's How
summary: More than $1.2 million worth of wrapped XRP tokens (wXRP) have been minted on Solana as the Ripple-linked asset gains greater DeFi utility.

title: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles exit OpenAI as company continues to shed ‘side quests’
summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.

title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
summary: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
summary: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.

title: Crypto Trader Turns $2,500 Into $500K on Skyrocketing Ethereum Meme Coin
summary: A meme coin trader turned $2,500 into nearly $500,000 in a matter of hours via the Elon Musk-linked ASTEROID token on Ethereum.

title: Anthropic’s Alarming Mythos Findings Replicated With Off-the-Shelf AI, Researchers Say
summary: Security researchers used GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 in an open-source harness to reproduce Anthropic's Mythos vulnerability findings for under $30 per scan.

title: Dogecoin Gold? A DOGE-Themed Company Is Joining the Tokenized Gold Rush
summary: The company Dogecoin Cash plans to develop tokens representing physical gold, following the lead of firms like Tether and Paxos.

title: Anthropic launches Claude Design, a new product for creating quick visuals
summary: The company says Claude Design is intended to help people like founders and product managers without a design background share their ideas more easily.

title: Neo co-founder proposes $461M treasury overhaul to end ‘trust me’ governance
summary: Neo’s proposed overhaul would restructure its foundation, return tokens to the community and impose formal oversight, as co-founders clash over governance and control.

title: Are we tokenmaxxing our way to nowhere?
summary: The gap between AI insiders and everyone else is widening, and the spending, suspicion, and even new vocabulary are starting to show it. While OpenAI is busy buying up everything from finance apps to talk shows, a certain shoe company just rebranded as an

title: OpenAI Super App Takes Shape: Codex Gets Computer Use, Browser, and Image Gen
summary: OpenAI's Codex desktop app now controls your Mac, runs its own browser, and generates images. The update pushes Codex further into territory occupied by Claude Code and OpenClaw.
